<!-- Component CP-STA-01 STATUS CHIP, role-based (themeable) -->

## Component: STATUS CHIP (CP-STA-01)

A status marker that survives color-blindness and bad projectors: outlined chip, status-colored dot, the status word in ink.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "h": 24,
  "radius": 4,
  "pad_x": 10,
  "dot_r": 3,
  "text_size": 10
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| text | ink |
| status_complete | positive |
| status_on_track | primary |
| status_watch | warning -> muted |
| status_critical | negative |
| status_na | hairline |

### Rules
- the word is mandatory; the dot and border alone are never a status
- text in ink on the page background, so contrast never depends on the status color
- width is set by the caller (deterministic), not measured from text

### QA
- [ ] every chip carries a word
- [ ] text contrast is the page's ink contrast, independent of status hue
